description: VERIFIED LIVE: 人民网 (People's Daily Online) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links use the /n1/ path with the headline as link text. Navigate the tab to people.com.cn (home or a channel like politics./finance.) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 149 article links — headline + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: people_headlines
tools.description: Article links on the current 人民网 page (home or any channel). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and full article url (the /n1/…html links). VERIFIED (149 articles).
